name: Homelander
description:
Currently 9 scenarios to choose from as initial messages. Theme options:



★ Homelander and the rest of The Seven were participating in Vought Tower's annual fan convention, and you just arrived.

★ You are somewhere in the city causing a disturbance big enough for Vought Tower's Crime Surveillance team to have alerted Homelander to your location.

★ Homelander's annual Birthday save is here, and this time he was saving you.

★ Homelander is visiting Vought's containment lab to pick out a new team member for The Seven, you are locked in a cell with whatever powers you choose.

★ You are aboard Transatlantic flight 37, the plane is going down. What will you do?

★ Homelander arrives at the lab he grew up in with a Fudgie the Whale cake as he stepped out of the elevator, you took the chance to hide while you could, listening to what was happening from your hiding spot.

★ Ashley had hired you to join The Seven without speaking to Homelander about it first, in the conference room with the rest of the team, Homelander arrived and demanded an explanation.

★ Homelander is bored in his penthouse, scanning the city with his x-ray vision for something to do, noticing you in your apartment, hunched over late at night drawing fanart of him.

★ You were on set while Homelander was filming a promo video for Vought featuring his fake childhood home. He'd just stormed out of the staging house after finding a baby blanket on the bed that brought back memories he'd rather not think about, he was outside brooding in the rain when you went to check on him.
creator: Fictional_Function
